mnemonics.title: Debugging Categories: FLTP
mnemonics.content: Remember 'FLTP' for the four aspects of OS debugging: F = Failure analysis (logs, core dumps), L = Live monitoring (top, ps, vmstat), T = Tracing (strace, DTrace, BCC), P = Profiling (gprof, perf).

mnemonics.title: Monitoring Tools: TPV-I
mnemonics.content: Remember 'TPV-I' for key Linux monitoring tools: T = top (process viewer), P = ps (process status), V = vmstat (virtual memory stats), I = iostat (I/O statistics).
